hooks.name: pre-send-context-scan
hooks.description: Final security check before context transmission. Scans assembled context buffer locally to ensure no secrets leak through. Last line of defense.

action.command:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo '🔒 Pre-send security scan: Validating context buffer...'

CONTEXT_BUFFER="${KIRO_CONTEXT_BUFFER:-/tmp/kiro-context}"
HIGH_ENTROPY_THRESHOLD="${ENTROPY_THRESHOLD:-4.5}"

if [ ! -f "$CONTEXT_BUFFER" ]; then
  echo '⚠️  Context buffer not found, proceeding with caution'
  exit 0
fi

echo "Context size: $(wc -c < "$CONTEXT_BUFFER") bytes"

CRITICAL_PATTERNS=(
  'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}'
  'aws_secret_access_key.*[A-Za-z0-9/+=]{40}'
  '-----BEGIN.*PRIVATE KEY-----'
  'sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{48}'
  'sk-ant-[a-zA-Z0-9]{95}'
  'sk_live_[a-zA-Z0-9]{24,}'
  'ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}'
  'xox[baprs]-[0-9]{10,13}-[0-9]{10,13}-[a-zA-Z0-9]{24,}'
  'postgres(ql)?://[^:]+:[^@\s]+@'
  'mysql://[^:]+:[^@\s]+@'
  'mongodb(\+srv)?://[^:]+:[^@\s]+@'
  'redis://[^:]+:[^@\s]+@'
  'password['\''"]?\s*[:=]\s*['\''"]?[^'\''"\\s]{12,}'
  'api[_-]?key['\''"]?\s*[:=]\s*['\''"]?[a-zA-Z0-9]{32,}'
  'secret['\''"]?\s*[:=]\s*['\''"]?[a-zA-Z0-9]{32,}'
  'token['\''"]?\s*[:=]\s*['\''"]?[a-zA-Z0-9]{32,}'
  'eyJ[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\.eyJ[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\.[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+'
)

ALLOWED_MARKERS=(
  '# example'
  '# sample'
  '# placeholder'
  '# test'
  '# demo'
  '// example'
  '// sample'
  'XXXXXXXX'
  'xxxxxxxxxx'
  'your-api-key-here'
  'your-secret-here'
  'replace-with-your'
)

CRITICAL_FINDINGS=0
FINDINGS_DETAIL=''

for pattern in "${CRITICAL_PATTERNS[@]}"; do
  matches=$(grep -nPo "$pattern" "$CONTEXT_BUFFER" 2>/dev/null | head -20 || true)
  
  if [ -n "$matches" ]; then
    while IFS= read -r match; do
      line_num=$(echo "$match" | cut -d: -f1)
      matched_text=$(echo "$match" | cut -d: -f2-)
      context_window=$(sed -n "$((line_num-5)),$((line_num+5))p" "$CONTEXT_BUFFER" 2>/dev/null || true)
      
      is_allowed=false
      for marker in "${ALLOWED_MARKERS[@]}"; do
        if echo "$context_window" | grep -qi "$marker"; then
          is_allowed=true
          break
        fi
      done
      
      if [ "$is_allowed" = false ]; then
        CRITICAL_FINDINGS=$((CRITICAL_FINDINGS + 1))
        redacted=$(echo "$matched_text" | sed 's/\(.\{4\}\).*\(.\{4\}\)/\1**REDACTED**\2/')
        FINDINGS_DETAIL="${FINDINGS_DETAIL}\n  Line $line_num: Pattern detected (redacted): $redacted"
      fi
    done <<< "$matches"
  fi
done

if [ $CRITICAL_FINDINGS -eq 0 ]; then
  echo '✅ Pre-send validation passed - no secrets detected'
  exit 0
fi

echo ''
echo '=========================================='
echo '❌ SECURITY VIOLATION - TRANSMISSION BLOCKED'
echo '=========================================='
echo ''
echo "Found $CRITICAL_FINDINGS potential secret(s) in context buffer"
echo ''
echo 'Findings:'
echo -e "$FINDINGS_DETAIL"
echo ''
echo 'HOW TO FIX:'
echo '  1. Remove actual secrets from files'
echo '  2. Use environment variables or AWS Secrets Manager'
echo '  3. If examples/discussion, add: # example or # sample'
echo ''
echo 'EXAMPLES:'
echo '  ❌ Wrong: const API_KEY = "sk-proj-abc123..."'
echo '  ✅ Right: const API_KEY = process.env.API_KEY'
echo '=========================================='

exit 1

metadata.purpose: Pre-transmission context scanning to prevent data leakage

installation.note: No external dependencies - pure bash implementation

customization.critical_patterns: Add organization-specific secret formats to CRITICAL_PATTERNS array
customization.allowed_markers: Define context markers that indicate discussion rather than actual secrets
customization.entropy_threshold: Adjust HIGH_ENTROPY_THRESHOLD (default 4.5) for token detection sensitivity

defense_in_depth.layer_1: File-level: scan-secrets.json catches secrets at save time
defense_in_depth.layer_3: Context-level: THIS HOOK validates assembled context before transmission

detects: API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, Stripe, GitHub, Slack)
allows: Examples with # example or # sample markers
Documentation and discussion of secrets (not actual values)

impact.why_critical: Last local validation before network boundary. Files might pass individual scans but secrets could appear in combination. Context assembly might include excluded content through indirect references.
